items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons package from version 6.7.2 to 7.2.0. Key changes include improvements and new features from the latest release, enhancing the icon library available for use in the project.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Vue Component to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/vue-fontawesome package from version 3.0.2 to 3.1.3. Key changes include the removal of Jest in favor of Vitest for improved test performance, updates to FontAwesomeIconProps, and various dependency updates. These enhancements will ensure better compatibility and performance within the Vue 3 + Vite ecosystem.

items.title: Update qs dependency to version 6.15.0 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the qs library from version 6.14.0 to 6.15.0. Key improvements include the addition of a strictMerge option for parsing conflicts and fixes to the duplicates option for bracket notation keys. These changes enhance the robustness and functionality of query string parsing in the application.

items.title: Enhance Chat with Tool-Calling UI in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update migrates chat API calls to the new `/aichat2/conversations` endpoint, enabling enhanced tool-calling capabilities. A new ToolActivity component has been added to display tool calls inline, complete with loading indicators and success/error statuses. The chat model has been updated to support tool-related fields, improving the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance Python Expression Output in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the sandbox code execution tool by enabling output for bare Python expressions. It utilizes AST transformation to automatically print the result of the last expression, ensuring that users see the computed results instead of '(no output)'. Key changes include handling various edge cases such as print statements and syntax errors.

items.title: Update Solana Wallet Adapter to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @solana/wallet-adapter-wallets package from version 0.19.37 to 0.19.38. Key changes include updated dependencies for Solflare and Phantom wallets, enhancing compatibility and performance. This ensures a smoother experience for users interacting with Solana wallets.

items.title: Update xterm web links addon to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @xterm/addon-web-links package from version 0.11.0 to 0.12.0. Key changes include improvements and new documentation visuals, enhancing the overall user experience. The package updates are reflected in both package.json and yarn.lock files.
